response.original_title: Married to the mafioso i saved
response.overview: Hannah Wilson, a qualified doctor who travels to the United States expecting to reunite with her fiancé, only to be betrayed and abandoned. In a desperate bid to stay, she flash-marriages Alex, a "street thug" she accidentally saved with a single kiss during his escape. Alex, secretly a powerful mafia boss, becomes both her protector and romantic partner, creating a mix of suspense, emotional tension, and tender romance
response.title: Married to the mafioso i saved
